title: AL's Creepers Revamped - New Spawn eggs
description: Makes the new spawn eggs compatible with AL's creepers revamped
body:
As with 1.21.5's new egg textures there also comes a new creeper spawn egg. This pack makes said egg look more like [AL's creepers revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/als-creepers-revamped)'s creepers

### NOTE: 
The new versions of [AL's creepers revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/als-creepers-revamped) add a custom egg, this is here for the people who use the older creepers
